gettingPokemon.title: Getting Pokémon
gettingPokemon.home: Link with Pokémon HOME to bring your Pokémon from past games or Pokémon GO directly into Pokémon Champions.
gettingPokemon.scout: You can also use the 'Scout' feature. Once a day, you can choose one Pokémon from a random selection to join your team and fight alongside you.

battleBasics.title: Battle Basics
battleBasics.team: Build a team of 6 Pokémon from your collection. Before a battle starts, both players reveal their full teams, and you select which Pokémon to send into battle based on predictions of the opponent's strategy.
battleBasics.mechanics: Take turns using moves. The player who reduces all of the opponent's Pokémon HP to 0 wins. You can swap Pokémon when in a pinch, or use 'Mega Evolution' to power up and unlock new abilities.
battleBasics.formats: Battle formats include 'Single Battle' (1v1) and 'Double Battle' (2v2).

battleModes.title: Online Battle Modes
battleModes.ranked: Ranked Battle: Match with trainers of similar rank and aim for the top.
battleModes.casual: Casual Battle: Play for fun without worrying about your win/loss record.
battleModes.private: Private Battle: Play with friends using a shared Room ID.
battleModes.tournament: Online Tournament: Compete under specific rules for a limited time period.

vpSystem.title: Using VP (Virtual Points)
vpSystem.intro: Battling earns you 'VP' which can be used in several ways:
vpSystem.training: Training: Easily customize your Pokémon's moves, natures, and stats (EVs/IVs). You can make offensive builds (Attack/Speed) or defensive walls (HP/Defense) easily to try out different strategies.
vpSystem.scoutExtensions: Scout Extensions: Spend VP to Scout multiple times a day. Additionally, normally scouted Pokémon leave after a week, but you can spend VP to keep them indefinitely.
vpSystem.shop: Shop: Use VP to purchase held items, Mega Stones, player outfits, makeup, ball throwing styles, and battle background music!
